pages.text: Murmur's body and head are seperate and its head will regrow until the body is dead
pages.title: Murmur Regrow

pages.text: With the new enchantment 'Stretchy Accumulation' found within the abandoned railwaysTendon Whips can grab items and xp for its user when launched
pages.title: Tendon Grab

pages.text: Wearing a unsettling kimono will cause iron golems and snow golems to attack you
pages.title: Unsettling Backfire
